description_long: This is a large, modern sniper rifle with a long, heavy barrel and a prominent scope mounted on top for precision aiming. The rifle features a bipod at the front for stability during long-range shooting, and a fixed stock at the rear for shoulder support. The magazine is a detachable box type, positioned just in front of the trigger guard. The muzzle is equipped with a muzzle brake, which helps reduce recoil when firing. The overall finish is matte black, giving it a tactical and utilitarian appearance. The rifle is constructed primarily from metal, with some polymer components likely used in the stock and grip.
description: A large, matte black sniper rifle with a long barrel, mounted scope, bipod, and detachable box magazine. It has a tactical appearance and is built for precision shooting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bipod legs splayed out and the muzzle brake at the end of the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, including the scope, bipod, fixed stock, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the fixed stock and the symmetrical arrangement of the bipod legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the scope and magazine.
